title: TEACHING THE STEPS OF CREATING ANIMATION TO STUDENTS IN HIGHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS
author: Bakiyeva Zukhra Rakhmatullayevna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In the conditions of globalization, taking into account the need and suggestions for improving efficiency in the fields of education, production and service, training competitive personnel, and making quality products, the development of students' creative ability and design knowledge with the help of computers is considered as a very urgent issue. After all, nowadays, activities in the fields of education, service and production are carried out almost on the basis of computer technology.
steps_raw: In the conditions of globalization, taking into account the need and suggestions for improving efficiency in the fields of education, production and service, training competitive personnel, and making quality products, the development of students' creative ability and design knowledge with the help of computers is considered as a very urgent issue. After all, nowadays, activities in the fields of education, service and production are carried out almost on the basis of computer technology.
